use_cases: Animated backgrounds for hero sections and landing pages
Decorative loading indicators with pulsing ring patterns
Visual effects for data visualization dashboards
Ambient motion graphics for media and entertainment sites
ai_summary: A collection of canvas-based circle animations featuring pulsing wave patterns and shockwave effects. Uses monochrome white dots on dark backgrounds creating hypnotic, rhythmic visual effects. Organizes multiple animation types in a grid layout, suitable for decorative backgrounds, loading states, or ambient visual elements in SaaS and media applications.
